title: Boolean is_compiled queue cannot survive crashes
description: Compile state lives in raw markdown frontmatter as a boolean, so a mid-message crash leaves no way to distinguish 'not started' from 'partially applied'. Codex review explicitly calls this the biggest design lie in the draft schema.
fix_shape: data migration + new claim/finish state machine in Postgres (compile_state, compile_run_id, claimed_at, FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED)
evidence_code: shipped in PRs #132 (Phase A U1 catalog-truth compile-state), #87-91, ddd0c5a; src/db/messages.py implements pending/claimed/compiled/failed state machine with FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED in claim_next_message
evidence_wiki: N/A
evidence_email: raw files no longer carry compiled flag; Postgres messages table is single source of truth
evidence_trace: N/A
gap_notes: State machine fully shipped with claim/finish + stale-claim recovery.

title: YAML frontmatter corruption from edit_file destroys pages and goes undetected
description: Two related YAML failure modes: (a) edit_file produced 18 broken pages with only last_compiled remaining because naive content.split('---', 2) treated subject-tag dashes as YAML delimiters; auto-stamp then re-saved the corruption. (b) validate_wiki.py doesn't parse YAML strictly enough to fail on duplicate keys (e.g. two last_compiled and split sources blocks in sonarqube-quality-profile-transformation.md).
fix_shape: validator rule: strict YAML parse, fail on duplicate keys; refuse stamp on broken FM; edit_file payload-size guard + read-before-write enforcement
evidence_code: scripts/validate_wiki.py implements _construct_mapping_strict raising on duplicate YAML keys; EditPayloadSanityMiddleware in src/compile/middleware/edit_payload_sanity.py (PR #189, v10-U7) rejects oversized + malformed-YAML edit_file payloads
evidence_wiki: no current pages flagged with corrupted FM in baseline; check_my_work treats broken-FM mtime-window pages as touched so corrupted output can't return clean
evidence_trace: N/A
gap_notes: Strict YAML loader + payload-sanity middleware + critique fallback all in place.

title: Hallucination, fabricated quotes, date drift, truncated lists, and silent normalization in compiled pages
description: Compiled pages introduce facts not present in cited raw emails: (a) a quote attributed to Vikram Varshney who only appears in cc; (b) sentences citing raw files with no matching content (date-collision misattribution); (c) Dinesh quote attributed to 2026-04-06 when source date is Mar 26 (compiler tags every quote with the thread top-level date); (d) a 5-item numbered list silently truncated to 4; (e) verbatim quoted data ('Vietnam, India, Vietnam, Romania') silently de-duplicated to 'Vietnam, India, Romania'. All point at the same trust boundary: claims are not bound to substring evidence in cited raws.
fix_shape: agent prompt update + new tool get_raw_email_summary returning quoted_bodies with per-quote dates/speakers + factcheck validator (claim must substring-match cited raw; numbered-list lengths must match source; verbatim-preserve quoted data)
evidence_code: V12 prompt teaches <inline_citations>+<concept_vs_thread>; PR #218 added msg-hash inline footnotes; PR #223 critique anti-pattern H2 + summary-staleness; no substring-evidence enforcement validator found
evidence_wiki: vikram hallucinated quote removed; but V12 audit (2026-04-23) confirms agent did NOT remove legacy thread-subject H2s (0/16 cleanups), summary-staleness still present
evidence_trace: V12 audit identifies summary-staleness as 'load-bearing gap' — no factcheck-substring guard observed
prevention_where: src/compile/critique.py summary-staleness + anti-pattern H2 (PR #223); no substring-match-against-cited-raw factcheck rule
gap_notes: Forward-looking prompt + footnotes shipped; lacks a hard substring-evidence validator that would block fabricated quotes / silent list truncation. V12 confirmed structural drift fixed but content-fidelity guards weak.

title: Compile stalls / context blow-up on bloated entity pages with massive frontmatter sources
description: Hot entities (Himanshu Jain 26KB, Bharat Agarwal 20KB) accumulated 50+ source frontmatter entries; touching 2-3 such entities pushes effective context past 80-100k tokens, causing silent LiteLLM proxy timeouts and ~28min hangs.
fix_shape: data migration (move sources out of frontmatter) + new tool summarize_entity / read_wiki_page sections=body + page-size circuit breaker
evidence_code: Sources moved out of frontmatter to source_threads (thread_ids); EntityWriteAutohealMiddleware nudges agent to create_entities; ReadFileTruncationHintMiddleware (PR #201) + concise/detailed response_format (PR #196) bound page-context size
evidence_wiki: himanshu-jain.md is now 602 bytes (was 26KB); bharat-agarwal expected similarly migrated
evidence_trace: V12 50-compile audit (2026-04-23) shows no stalls or 80-100k context blow-ups
prevention_where: source_threads schema in scripts/validate_wiki.py + read_file truncation hint + EntityWriteAutohealMiddleware
gap_notes: Forward-looking + backfill complete. No active circuit breaker on page size but the data shape change removed the trigger.

title: Worktree view-root mismatch crashes compile silently with no preflight
description: Compile launched from worktree pr78-verify failed because raw/ wasn't symlinked into the worktree's view_root chroot. find_new_sources read absolute raw_paths from shared Postgres state but FilesystemBackend rejected them as outside root. Two traces, both 3-error severity, no graceful failure.
fix_shape: Coordinator preflight checks (raw_paths_exist, view_resolves_paths) that fail fast at startup with operator-visible message
evidence_code: scripts/compile_all.py:_preflight_mount_sanity aborts on missing raw_dir, 0 .md files, missing wiki/topics — runs BEFORE LLM/DB work
evidence_wiki: N/A
evidence_trace: no recurrence post-shipping per V12 audit
gap_notes: Coordinator preflight in place with operator-visible click.ClickException.

title: find_new_sources psycopg3 placeholder crash on subject_contains
description: SQL built subject ILIKE '%' || %s || '%' triggered psycopg3 ProgrammingError 'only %s, %b, %t are allowed as placeholders, got %''. Tool call burned 573 output tokens looping recovery before failing the batch.
fix_shape: Wrap wildcards in Python f-string and bind as single %s parameter instead of concatenating them in SQL
evidence_code: src/db/messages.py uses f'%{sender_contains}%' Python f-string for ILIKE wildcard, single %s parameterized bind (no SQL concatenation)
evidence_wiki: N/A
evidence_trace: no recurrence in V12 audit
gap_notes: Fix is in code; no specific test guarding the wildcard binding shape but pattern is now correct.

title: LiteLLM transport failures (silent 200-empty, 401/403, 429, bad-model-allowlist) bypass retry gate
description: Multiple infra-error shapes that the retry gate didn't recognize and instead failed batches: (a) 5/7 minimax failures returned HTTP 200 with empty payload (Bug J); (b) glm-5 401 'team-not-allowed' and bare 'Error code: 401' string slipped past _is_model_unavailable_error matcher (Bug K); (c) bad model variants (z-ai/glm-5.1) and team-allowlist mismatches caused instant 401/400 fail; (d) TPM 429s every ~60s under 30k cap caused mid-edit page corruption when edit_file abandoned mid-call.
fix_shape: broaden _is_model_unavailable_error matcher (200-empty + bare 401/403 strings + bad-model-name 400); retry logic on 429; per-batch timeout in compile_overnight.sh; drop bad model variants from LLM_MODEL_POOL and validate against team allowlist; pre-compile snapshot
evidence_code: shipped in PRs #142 (200-empty Bug J), #146 (bare 401/403 Bug K), #238 (5xx HTML proxy errors), #237 (drop fictitious models + split timeouts), #231 (pool config); _is_model_unavailable_error matcher broadened to handle 200-empty, 401/403 bare strings, 400 invalid model, 5xx HTML
evidence_wiki: N/A
evidence_trace: V12 audit (2026-04-23) shows pool of 5 models running; minimax + glm + grok + kimi + qwen all classified per-batch
gap_notes: All four error shapes now caught and classified.

evidence_wiki: N/A

gap_notes: Tool contract now enforces email_path for skip categories with autoheal fallback.

title: Chronological scope leak via greedy thread reading contaminates pages with future context
description: Agent's get_thread_context + read_file gave it visibility into emails dated AFTER the current batch email, contaminating people/wikilinks with future-only references. Compounds into recursion/wikilink-cascade death spirals on large cross-team threads (SEO Rework Cycle 4 case 1: 13-message thread, recursion_limit=150 in 8m 35s, broken-wikilink reviewer block + create_entities rejection + patch_page duplicate-section spiral).
fix_shape: coordinator-scope-filter: batch_cutoff_date filter on get_thread_context + ChronologicalScopeMiddleware on read_file; create_entities scope alignment is resolved upstream by the same fix
evidence_code: PR #139 ChronologicalScopeMiddleware + _current_batch_cutoff_date ContextVar in src/compile/compiler.py; tests/test_chronological_scope.py
evidence_wiki: N/A
evidence_trace: V12 audit makes no mention of chronological-scope leak
gap_notes: Cutoff enforced via middleware that rejects future-dated raw reads; prompt + test guards in place.

title: Validator enforces v9-U1 8-H2 schema that 0/303 organic topic pages match; prompt teaches it but agent never produces it
description: The canonical v9-U1 topic schema (Summary/Current state/Why it matters/Key decisions/Recent changes/Open questions/Related pages/References) is satisfied by 0 of 303 organic topic pages at the 5-of-8 bar. 218/303 (72%) instead converge on a design-doc shape (Overview/Background/Problem/Solution/Implementation/Results/Way forward) the prompt never teaches. validate_wiki.py also enforces 2-sentence lead paragraph and a domain frontmatter field that the prompt teaches none of (399 domain-missing, 306 sections-missing, 263 broken-wikilinks, 244 lead-paragraph at Cycle 9). Cycle-10 runs produce pages matching corpus shape, not validator schema. 3/3 then 6/7 topic pages contained zero of 8 prompt-taught canonical H2s; validator substring-match permits any non-empty H2 list.
fix_shape: Replace SUGGESTED_SECTIONS['topic'] and critique._check_suggested_h2_sections substring list with the 7-slot organic shape; rewrite compile prompt's topic-shape section to teach the 7-slot organic shape with the design-doc archetype as the lead example; hard-fail validator on zero required H2s
evidence_code: PR #179 (v9-U1 teach validator-required sections), #204 (v11-U7 reviewer structure_mismatch), #215 (V12-U1 concept_vs_thread reframe), #223 (V12 critique anti-pattern H2); src/compile/section_shapes.py defines SUGGESTED_SECTIONS canonical 7-slot list
evidence_wiki: Adoption still very low — only 12% of 326 topic pages have ## Summary, 8% Why it matters, 14% Recent changes, 17% References. Schema is taught + enforced for new compiles but ~85% of legacy corpus does not match
evidence_trace: V12 audit (2026-04-23) shows 11/16 V12-touched pages got ## Recent changes added; 0/16 cleaned up legacy thread-subject H2s — forward-looking works, backfill open
gap_notes: Forward-looking shipped (prompt + critique + reviewer); legacy 326-page topic backfill is unrun. validate_wiki is warn-only, not hard-fail on zero canonical H2s.

title: Pages-as-summary framing produces filing-cabinets, not concept pages (dated H2s, thread-mirror anti-pattern)
description: Per-batch instruction tells the agent to 'compile emails into wiki pages', yielding agent-describing-the-email behavior. Pages mirror email threads 1:1 with one dated H2 per contributor email instead of synthesizing into canonical sections (SEO Rework: 5 emails -> 5 parallel dated H2s; Photosearch 5 dated H2s; 7/10 audited pages affected). Bug F: patch_page repeatedly on same section appended rather than replacing, so duplicate H2 sections proliferated (corpus-wide ~50-74 dated-H2 + 43 MD024 dup-heading legacy debt). The reframe: emails are EVIDENCE; the page is a durable CONCEPT.
fix_shape: Rewrite scripts/compile_all.py per-batch instruction to 'Update or create the CONCEPT page that best describes the subject of these emails'. Add <concept_vs_thread> section to src/compile/prompts.py. Forward-looking prompt fix #148 + dated-H2 validator #150; backfill rewriter v9-U4. patch_page tool contract replaces section atomically.
evidence_code: PR #148 (canonical H2 titles), #150 (warn on dated/attributed H2), #187 (fix_dated_h2_sections backfill script), #215 (V12-U1 concept_vs_thread), #223 (anti-pattern H2 critique check); ANTI_PATTERN_H2 in src/compile/section_shapes.py
evidence_wiki: wiki-wide dated H2 down to 4 pages / 7 instances (was 26 pages / 61 instances per baseline — actually baseline already shows 26pp/61inst pre-this-fix, may need to recheck). fix_dated_h2_sections backfill ran. New compiles (V12 audit) added 0 dated H2s
evidence_trace: V12 audit confirms agent did NOT add dated H2s to V12 compiles but also did NOT remove legacy ones (0/16 cleanups)
gap_notes: Forward-looking concept-vs-thread reframe shipped; majority of legacy debt drained but a handful of pages still hold dated H2s. patch_page atomic-replace shipped.

title: Sources frontmatter bloat couples knowledge to provenance — direction unresolved across docs

title: resolve_page under-recalls and ranks alphabetically; people queries route wrong; exact slugs miss
